steps.notes: All 7 clients completed with 5 tailored stories each: Incserv (Risk/Reg + Vendor/Platform mix), M&T Bank (OCC gap + NY moratorium + bots + EO + Apple), Brown Advisory (selloff + SEC + IPOs + gov equity + China grid), Alpine Associates (activist lens on selloff, IPOs, gov equity, China decoupling, OpenAI robotics), KPS Life (Collate + HAPI + EO + RCE + FL AG — all framed as embedded expert leverage), ChristianaCare (HAPI + German court + CISA + House bill + Collate — all through patient safety lens), Luna Diabetes (CISA + Fable 5 containment + Cognition + Collate docs + RCE — lean-team, pre-commercial frame). Each brief staged as JSON in workspace/run/brief-assembly/. 210 stories across 7 briefs, all with tailored What It Means, client translation, If Used Why rationale, and Week In One Line synthesis.
